---
title: "Selecting Tables"
engine: knitr
filters:
  - interactive-duckdb
databases:
  - name: subscriptions
    path: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Alaburda/data-analyst-sql-cookbook/master/databases/carwash.duckdb"
    format: duckdb
---

This chapter includes a lot of things you can accomplish between the confines of SELECT and FROM statements.

## UNION

UNION and UNION ALL are different - UNION does an implicit DISTINCT after appending the tables, UNION ALL does not.
